verses.1: The LORD’s word that came to Joel, the son of Pethuel.
verses.4: What the swarming locust has left, the great locust has eaten.
verses.5: Wake up, you drunkards, and weep!
verses.6: For a nation has come up on my land, strong, and without number.
verses.7: He has laid my vine waste,
verses.8: Mourn like a virgin dressed in sackcloth
verses.9: The meal offering and the drink offering are cut off from the LORD’s house.
verses.12: The vine has dried up, and the fig tree withered—
verses.13: Put on sackcloth and mourn, you priests!
verses.16: Isn’t the food cut off before our eyes,
verses.17: The seeds rot under their clods.
verses.20: Yes, the animals of the field pant to you,
